message:
Add Excalidraw SVG generation step to CI workflow

The build was failing because generated SVGs (which are gitignored) were
not being created before the Astro build step.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,6 +54,9 @@ jobs:
         if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
         run: pnpm generate:claude-plugins
 
+      - name: Generate Excalidraw SVGs
+        run: pnpm generate:excalidraw
+
       - name: Setup GitHub Pages
         id: pages
         uses: actions/configure-pages@v5
